scripts.check:domain: jiti tests/domain-checks.ts && jiti tests/ai-assistant-source-checks.ts && jiti tests/ai-assistant-connector-checks.ts && jiti tests/app-undo-checks.ts && jiti tests/app-performance-source-checks.ts && jiti tests/vehicle-table-source-checks.ts && jiti tests/fleet-daily-state-checks.ts && jiti tests/data-layer-source-checks.ts && jiti tests/shared-app-settings-snapshot-checks.ts && jiti tests/pto-report-reason-checks.ts && jiti tests/pto-report-domain-checks.ts && jiti tests/pto-persistence-source-checks.ts && jiti tests/pto-persistence-checks.ts && jiti tests/pto-rows-by-tables-checks.ts && jiti tests/pto-mysql-persistence-checks.ts && jiti tests/pto-inline-baseline-checks.ts && jiti tests/pto-excel-import-checks.ts && jiti tests/pto-date-container-model-checks.ts && jiti tests/pto-formula-selection-checks.ts && jiti tests/pto-buckets-column-checks.ts && jiti tests/pto-buckets-grid-checks.ts && jiti tests/pto-buckets-virtual-grid-checks.ts && jiti tests/pto-performance-virtual-grid-checks.ts && jiti tests/pto-buckets-editor-checks.ts && jiti tests/supabase-pto-storage-checks.ts && jiti tests/supabase-pto-inline-commands-checks.ts && jiti tests/report-display-checks.ts && jiti tests/database-router-checks.ts && jiti tests/database-rpc-checks.ts && jiti tests/xlsx-utils-checks.ts && jiti tests/vehicle-inline-grid-checks.ts && jiti tests/vehicles-persistence-checks.ts
